name: Herbag leather tote
description:
Feel free to message us for more details and photos before ordering.
HERMÈS Rare Vintage Herbag 31 Sellier - Ébène Leather & Gold Hardware

Product Details:
Brand: Hermès
Model: Herbag 31 (Vintage Sellier / Outer Stitching)
Material: Earth-tone Sheepskin/Shearling and Ébène (Dark Brown) Leather Trims
Hardware: Gold-tone (GHW)
Size: 31 cm

Key Features & Accessories:
- 2-in-1 Interchangeable Design: Includes a second replacement bag body in a gorgeous vintage Dark Green.
- Ultimate Versatility: Completely reversible design offering up to 4 different ways to wear. Straps can be creatively adjusted to convert the bag into a backpack.
- Collector's Masterpiece: A highly sought-after, discontinued treasure. Production was permanently ceased due to the extremely complex and time-consuming artisanal craftsmanship required.

Condition Report:
Excellent pre-owned vintage condition (9.8/10). The bag is exceptionally well-preserved with no noticeable flaws. A true flawless masterpiece for collectors. Please examine all photos carefully before placing your order to appreciate its stunning condition.
